title: Freshly Grilled Low-Calorie Bun Stir-fry
description: This festive Croatian dish features tender buns grilled to perfection in a low-calorie-friendly way, perfect for a light lunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the buns into halves for easy handling and stacking on the grill.
Mince the garlic cloves and finely chop the mixed vegetables.
In a bowl, mix chopped vegetables with minced garlic. Drizzle with olive oil lightly.
Brush some olive oil onto each side of the whole wheat bun slices to prevent sticking.
Place the breaded buns on the preheated grill, placing vegetable mixture between each layer for added flavor and texture.
Grill until golden brown on both sides and vegetables are tender. This should take about 5-7 minutes per batch.
While grilling, sprinkle sunflower seeds over one side of the grilled bun to add a crunchy texture without altering the low-calorie profile.
